spec.description: AzureASOManagedClusterTemplateSpec defines the desired state of AzureASOManagedClusterTemplate.
AzureASOManagedClusterTemplateResourceSpec defines the desired state of the templated resource.

resources.description: Resources are embedded ASO resources to be managed by this resource.

exampleYAML:
apiVersion: infrastructure.cluster.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1

  namespace: default
